name: Merging two same-level books produces one book of the next level
description: Purchased books auto-equip into the equipped slots row. Tapping one equipped book and then another equipped book of the same level merges them into a single higher-level book.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Click the BUY button twice. Each purchased book auto-equips into the equipped slots row near the top of the BOOKS panel, each showing a Lv1 badge
In the equipped slots row, tap one book showing Lv1, then tap another book showing Lv1
A book showing a Lv2 badge is present in the equipped slots row
The number of occupied equipped slots is one fewer than before the merge, and a MERGED floating text or merge effect appeared
